rationale: Elec. Code §277.005 restricts political subdivisions from proposing ballot measures conflicting with petition-initiated measures. The proposed change is a state statutory amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b), not a political subdivision ballot measure.
quote: A political subdivision may not propose a measure, including a charter amendment, that will appear on the same ballot as a petition-initiated measure
_note: No conflict; §277.005 governs political subdivision ballot measures, not statewide statutory amendments to the Tax Code.
